--- Cargo.toml ---
# ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN ---- spec-hash:b82b8b2f45d2b153

[package]
name = "percolator"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"


[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib", "lib"]


[features]
client = []
debug = []


[dependencies]
qedgen-macros = { git = "https://github.com/qedgen/solana-skills", tag = "v2.33.0" }

anchor-lang = "0.32.1"

[workspace]



--- src/errors.rs ---
// ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN — DO NOT EDIT ---- spec-hash:753eab25cfdeae7b
use anchor_lang::prelude::*;

#[error_code]
pub enum PercolatorError {
    InsufficientFunds = 0,
    SlotInactive = 1,
    SlotAlreadyActive = 2,
    AccountUnderwater = 3,
    AccountHealthy = 4,
    BankruptPosition = 5,
    VaultOverflow = 6,
    MathOverflow = 7,
    InvalidLifecycle = 8,
}
// ---- END GENERATED ----

--- src/guards.rs ---
// ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN — DO NOT EDIT — regenerated from .qedspec ----
//! Per-handler guard checks derived from the `.qedspec`.
//! Called from user-owned `instructions/<name>::handler` before
//! business logic; keep guard logic here, policy-free logic there.

#![allow(unused_variables, unused_imports, dead_code, clippy::too_many_arguments)]

use anchor_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::errors::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::math::*;
use crate::*;

/// Guards for `add_user`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn add_user<'info>(ctx: &mut AddUser<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 0
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 0) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotAlreadyActive.into()); }
    // requires: (((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((0) : Int))
    if !(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128)) { return Err(PercolatorError::AccountUnderwater.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `add_lp`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn add_lp<'info>(ctx: &mut AddLp<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 0
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 0) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotAlreadyActive.into()); }
    // requires: (((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((0) : Int))
    if !(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128)) { return Err(PercolatorError::AccountUnderwater.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `reclaim_empty_account`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn reclaim_empty_account<'info>(ctx: &mut ReclaimEmptyAccount<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].capital = 0
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital == 0) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].reserved_pnl = 0
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].reserved_pnl == 0) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].fee_credits = 0
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].fee_credits == 0) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `close_account`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn close_account<'info>(ctx: &mut CloseAccount<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.V ≥ s.accounts[i].capital
    if !(ctx.vault.V >= ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) { return Err(PercolatorError::InsufficientFunds.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `deposit`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn deposit<'info>(ctx: &mut Deposit<'info>, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.V + amount ≤ 10000000000000000
    if !(ctx.vault.V + amount <= 10000000000000000) { return Err(PercolatorError::VaultOverflow.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `withdraw`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn withdraw<'info>(ctx: &mut Withdraw<'info>, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].capital ≥ amount
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital >= amount) { return Err(PercolatorError::InsufficientFunds.into()); }
    // requires: (((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((amount) : Int))
    if !(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((amount) as i128)) { return Err(PercolatorError::InsufficientFunds.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `top_up_insurance`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn top_up_insurance<'info>(ctx: &mut TopUpInsurance<'info>, amount: u128) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.V + amount ≤ 10000000000000000
    if !(ctx.vault.V + amount <= 10000000000000000) { return Err(PercolatorError::VaultOverflow.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `deposit_fee_credits`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn deposit_fee_credits<'info>(ctx: &mut DepositFeeCredits<'info>, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.V + amount ≤ 10000000000000000
    if !(ctx.vault.V + amount <= 10000000000000000) { return Err(PercolatorError::VaultOverflow.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `convert_released_pnl`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn convert_released_pnl<'info>(ctx: &mut ConvertReleasedPnl<'info>, i: usize, x: u128) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].reserved_pnl ≥ x
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].reserved_pnl >= x) { return Err(PercolatorError::InsufficientFunds.into()); }
    // requires: s.V ≥ x
    if !(ctx.vault.V >= x) { return Err(PercolatorError::InsufficientFunds.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `execute_trade`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn execute_trade<'info>(ctx: &mut ExecuteTrade<'info>, a: usize, b: usize, size_q: i128, exec_price: u64) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[a].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(a) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[b].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(b) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: a ≠ b
    if !(a != b) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: (((size_q) * ((((exec_price) : Int)))) / (1000000)) ≤ (((100000000000000000000) : Int))
    if !(mul_div_floor_u128(((size_q) as u128), ((exec_price) as u128), ((1000000) as u128)) <= 100000000000000000000) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `liquidate_case_0`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn liquidate_case_0<'info>(ctx: &mut LiquidateCase0<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: (((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((0) : Int))
    if !(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128)) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: 0 = 1
    if !(false) { return Err(PercolatorError::AccountHealthy.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `liquidate_case_1`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn liquidate_case_1<'info>(ctx: &mut LiquidateCase1<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: ¬((((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((0) : Int)))
    if !(!(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128))) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: (((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl + (((s.I) : Int)) ≥ (((0) : Int))
    if !(((((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.I) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128)) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `liquidate_otherwise`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn liquidate_otherwise<'info>(ctx: &mut LiquidateOtherwise<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    // requires: ¬((((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl ≥ (((0) : Int)))
    if !(!(((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128))) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: ¬((((s.accounts[i].capital) : Int)) + s.accounts[i].pnl + (((s.I) : Int)) ≥ (((0) : Int)))
    if !(!(((((((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].pnl) as i128)) as i128) + ((ctx.vault.I) as i128)) as i128) >= ((0) as i128))) { return Err(anchor_lang::error::Error::from(ProgramError::Custom(0xFF))); }
    // requires: 0 = 1
    if !(false) { return Err(PercolatorError::BankruptPosition.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `settle_account`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn settle_account<'info>(ctx: &mut SettleAccount<'info>, i: usize) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // requires: s.accounts[i].active = 1
    if !(ctx.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active == 1) { return Err(PercolatorError::SlotInactive.into()); }
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `trigger_adl`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn trigger_adl<'info>(ctx: &mut TriggerAdl<'info>) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Active
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Active as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // lifecycle: status := Draining
    ctx.vault.status = Status::Draining as u8;
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `complete_drain`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn complete_drain<'info>(ctx: &mut CompleteDrain<'info>) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Draining
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Draining as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // lifecycle: status := Resetting
    ctx.vault.status = Status::Resetting as u8;
    Ok(())
}

/// Guards for `reset`.  
/// Generated from the `requires` clauses of the spec handler block.
pub fn reset<'info>(ctx: &mut Reset<'info>) -> Result<()> {
    // lifecycle: require status == Resetting
    if ctx.vault.status != Status::Resetting as u8 { return Err(crate::errors::PercolatorError::InvalidLifecycle.into()); }
    // lifecycle: status := Active
    ctx.vault.status = Status::Active as u8;
    Ok(())
}

// ---- END GENERATED ----

--- src/instructions/add_lp.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct AddLp<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> AddLp<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "add_lp", hash = "055e063829674979", spec_hash = "bd20261ef292bca6")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::add_lp(self, i)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active = (1).into();
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/close_account.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct CloseAccount<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> CloseAccount<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "close_account", hash = "7b2a0c9556522bf0", spec_hash = "6537f7c1d89dcb54")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::close_account(self, i)?;
        let capital: u128 = self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital.into();
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_sub(capital).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital = (0).into();
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active = (0).into();
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/complete_drain.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.

    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::complete_drain(self)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/convert_released_pnl.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct ConvertReleasedPnl<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> ConvertReleasedPnl<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "convert_released_pnl", hash = "e41a233700311ac6", spec_hash = "cad0809661eff4aa")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize, x: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::convert_released_pnl(self, i, x)?;
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_sub(x).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].reserved_pnl = self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].reserved_pnl.checked_sub(x).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/deposit.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Deposit<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> Deposit<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "deposit", hash = "ec60291f63e98a6d", spec_hash = "c1246b21825b0ed2")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::deposit(self, i, amount)?;
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital = self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/deposit_fee_credits.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct DepositFeeCredits<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> DepositFeeCredits<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "deposit_fee_credits", hash = "964f865af58d906d", spec_hash = "2ec166fc7b6d1c47")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::deposit_fee_credits(self, i, amount)?;
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.F = self.vault.F.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].fee_credits = self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].fee_credits.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, a: usize, b: usize, size_q: i128, exec_price: u64) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::execute_trade(self, a, b, size_q, exec_price)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::liquidate_case_0(self, i)?;

--- src/instructions/liquidate_case_1.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct LiquidateCase1<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> LiquidateCase1<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "liquidate", hash = "367898d036b25cdc", spec_hash = "7bd0413339d25826")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::liquidate_case_1(self, i)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active = (0).into();
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/liquidate_otherwise.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct LiquidateOtherwise<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> LiquidateOtherwise<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "liquidate", hash = "0acf8b80d22d297b", spec_hash = "7bd0413339d25826")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::liquidate_otherwise(self, i)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/reclaim_empty_account.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct ReclaimEmptyAccount<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> ReclaimEmptyAccount<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "reclaim_empty_account", hash = "d7f716c1f6c51de1", spec_hash = "131b0df2f49fa778")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::reclaim_empty_account(self, i)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].active = (0).into();
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/reset.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Reset<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> Reset<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "reset", hash = "c0dae68f126df9f1", spec_hash = "16b18e714298add7")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::reset(self)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/settle_account.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct SettleAccount<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> SettleAccount<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "settle_account", hash = "c5322496a7a6fa0f", spec_hash = "42b871da01252ded")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::settle_account(self, i)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/top_up_insurance.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct TopUpInsurance<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> TopUpInsurance<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "top_up_insurance", hash = "401a67b01994714c", spec_hash = "056c1e0955d861c4")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::top_up_insurance(self, amount)?;
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.I = self.vault.I.checked_add(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/trigger_adl.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct TriggerAdl<'info> {
    pub authority: &'info Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> TriggerAdl<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "trigger_adl", hash = "4f75dd7330073924", spec_hash = "16b18e714298add7")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::trigger_adl(self)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/instructions/withdraw.rs ---
// User-owned. Regenerating the spec does NOT overwrite this file.
// Guard checks live in the sibling `crate::guards` module and ARE
// regenerated on every `qedgen codegen`. Drift between the spec
// handler block and the `spec_hash` below fires a compile_error!
// via the `#[qed(verified, ...)]` macro.

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;
use crate::state::*;
use crate::guards;
use qedgen_macros::qed;
use crate::errors::*;

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Withdraw<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub authority: &'info mut Signer,
    #[account(mut, has_one = authority)]
    pub vault: &'info mut Account<PercolatorAccount>,
}

impl<'info> Withdraw<'info> {
    #[qed(verified, spec = "../percolator.qedspec", handler = "withdraw", hash = "a1ffd9a30364a620", spec_hash = "16390bf2da1be4e7")]
    #[inline(always)]
    pub fn handler(&mut self, i: usize, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        guards::withdraw(self, i, amount)?;
        self.vault.V = self.vault.V.checked_sub(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital = self.vault.accounts[(i) as usize].capital.checked_sub(amount).ok_or(PercolatorError::MathOverflow)?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

--- src/lib.rs ---
// ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN — DO NOT EDIT ---- spec-hash:f1285c28093087c9
#![cfg_attr(any(target_os = "solana", target_arch = "bpf"), no_std)]

use quasar_lang::prelude::*;

mod instructions;
use instructions::*;
pub mod errors;
pub mod state;
pub mod guards;
pub mod math;

declare_id!("11111111111111111111111111111111");

#[program]
mod percolator {
    use super::*;

    #[instruction(discriminator = 0)]
    pub fn add_user(ctx: Ctx<AddUser>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 1)]
    pub fn add_lp(ctx: Ctx<AddLp>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 2)]
    pub fn reclaim_empty_account(ctx: Ctx<ReclaimEmptyAccount>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 3)]
    pub fn close_account(ctx: Ctx<CloseAccount>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 4)]
    pub fn deposit(ctx: Ctx<Deposit>, i: u32, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize, amount)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 5)]
    pub fn withdraw(ctx: Ctx<Withdraw>, i: u32, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize, amount)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 6)]
    pub fn top_up_insurance(ctx: Ctx<TopUpInsurance>, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(amount)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 7)]
    pub fn deposit_fee_credits(ctx: Ctx<DepositFeeCredits>, i: u32, amount: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize, amount)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 8)]
    pub fn convert_released_pnl(ctx: Ctx<ConvertReleasedPnl>, i: u32, x: u128) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize, x)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 9)]
    pub fn execute_trade(ctx: Ctx<ExecuteTrade>, a: u32, b: u32, size_q: i128, exec_price: u64) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(a as usize, b as usize, size_q, exec_price)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 10)]
    pub fn liquidate_case_0(ctx: Ctx<LiquidateCase0>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 11)]
    pub fn liquidate_case_1(ctx: Ctx<LiquidateCase1>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 12)]
    pub fn liquidate_otherwise(ctx: Ctx<LiquidateOtherwise>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 13)]
    pub fn settle_account(ctx: Ctx<SettleAccount>, i: u32) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler(i as usize)
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 14)]
    pub fn trigger_adl(ctx: Ctx<TriggerAdl>) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler()
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 15)]
    pub fn complete_drain(ctx: Ctx<CompleteDrain>) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler()
    }

    #[instruction(discriminator = 16)]
    pub fn reset(ctx: Ctx<Reset>) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
        ctx.accounts.handler()
    }

}
// ---- END GENERATED ----

--- src/math.rs ---
// ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN — DO NOT EDIT ----
//! Fixed-point math helpers used by spec-derived guards and properties.

#![allow(dead_code)]

/// Floor of `(a * b) / d`. Returns `0` if `d == 0` (caller must guard).
/// Uses saturating multiplication as a safe approximation; specs that need
/// exact u256-width fixed-point math should pin a checked widening crate
/// once the spec language exposes one.
#[inline]
pub fn mul_div_floor_u128(a: u128, b: u128, d: u128) -> u128 {
if d == 0 {
return 0;
}
a.saturating_mul(b) / d
}

/// Ceiling of `(a * b) / d`. Same caveats as `mul_div_floor_u128`.
#[inline]
pub fn mul_div_ceil_u128(a: u128, b: u128, d: u128) -> u128 {
if d == 0 {
return 0;
}
let prod = a.saturating_mul(b);
if prod % d == 0 {
prod / d
} else {
(prod / d).saturating_add(1)
}
}
// ---- END GENERATED ----

--- src/state.rs ---
// ---- GENERATED BY QEDGEN — DO NOT EDIT ---- spec-hash:2817873fa4ef7643
use anchor_lang::prelude::*;

#[repr(C)]
#[derive(AnchorSerialize, AnchorDeserialize, InitSpace, Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq)]
pub struct Account {
    pub active: u8,
    pub capital: u128,
    pub reserved_pnl: u128,
    pub pnl: i128,
    pub fee_credits: u128,
}

#[account]
pub struct PercolatorAccount {
    pub authority: Pubkey,
    pub V: u128,
    pub I: u128,
    pub F: u128,
    pub accounts: [Account; 1024],
    pub status: u8,
}

/// Program lifecycle states.
#[derive(Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
#[repr(u8)]
pub enum Status {
    Active = 0,
    Draining = 1,
    Resetting = 2,
}
// ---- END GENERATED ----
